summary: End-to-end testing of Sahuja Interiors portfolio site. Backend (pytest 8/8 passed) validates POST /api/contact (valid/invalid/missing fields), GET /api/contacts (no _id leakage), and GET /api/ root. Frontend Playwright tests validated all landing sections (hero, navbar, services x6, portfolio filters 10->2->2, testimonials x4, process 01-04, contact, footer), desktop + mobile menu, and full contact form submission (POST /api/contact -> 201, success toast, form reset).

minor.issue: create_contact wraps Pydantic/Mongo exceptions in a bare try/except that converts any error into HTTP 500 'Unable to submit contact request'. This is fine in practice but masks underlying failure details from logs consumers. Logger is also declared below the routes (still works due to Python late-binding) but is a code-smell.

ui_bugs.issue: Mobile menu panel (data-testid='mobile-menu') is transparent/not opaque — underlying page content (section text, images) bleeds through making menu items hard to read. Needs solid background (e.g. bg-white / backdrop-blur) and/or higher z-index on the panel.

Empty-form submission triggers browser-native HTML5 'Please fill out this field' tooltip instead of the custom sonner error toast (toast.error branch is unreachable because FloatingField inputs have `required` attribute). Consider removing `required` from <input>/<textarea> and relying on the JS validation in onSubmit, or vice-versa.

issues: Menu panel background transparent — content from Process section visible through it, hurting legibility and contrast.

action_items: Give the mobile menu panel a solid background and higher z-index so section content does not bleed through.

Decide on validation strategy for contact form: either drop `required` from FloatingField inputs to surface sonner toast, or remove the JS toast branch and rely on native HTML5 validation. Currently the custom toast path is dead code.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py: `logger` is instantiated AFTER the route handlers (line 121) that reference it (line 89). Works due to Python late-binding but should be moved to top of module for clarity.
server.py: broad except Exception in create_contact hides Pydantic/Mongo error details; prefer letting FastAPI produce 422/500 with structured detail.
Portfolio.jsx: filter logic fine. AnimatePresence exit animations can leave stale nodes briefly — tests must wait ~1s after filter click.
Contact.jsx: `required` HTML attr + JS toast is contradictory; pick one path.
seed_data_creation: Inserted several TEST_-prefixed contacts via /api/contact during backend and frontend tests. No cleanup performed — safe since collection is not user-facing.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend pytest file at /app/backend/tests/test_contact_api.py (8 tests, all green). Contact form input data-testids are 'contact-input-<name>' (not 'contact-<name>-input'). Portfolio 'All' shows 10 items; Bedroom=2, Office=2, etc. Mobile menu toggle is 'navbar-mobile-toggle' opening 'mobile-menu' — but panel background is transparent (bug). Deployed URL: https://sahuja-portfolio.preview.emergentagent.com.
rca_of_the_issue: Mobile menu transparency: likely the menu container uses bg-transparent or a color with low alpha; needs bg-white or bg-[#0A0A0A] with full opacity plus z-50 to sit above the scrolled section content. Empty-form toast: HTML5 `required` intercepts submit before React handler runs, preventing toast.error from firing.
